ARGUED AND THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION. MR. RICE LEAVES A PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
